mission.label: Mission
mission.description: Ordered list of steps. Each step: {"command": "forward|backward|turn_left|turn_right|stop", "duration": seconds}.

linear_speed.label: Linear Speed (m/s)
linear_speed.description: Speed in m/s for forward and backward commands.

angular_speed.label: Angular Speed (rad/s)
angular_speed.description: Rotation speed in rad/s for turn commands.
